texts.text: The OCR Results may vary depending on the image resolution. Please verify the extracted data and update if necessary.
NRIC and Driving License does not match
Allow Company To View Assigned Cases
Create new view third party case request
Edit view third party case request
Delete view third party case request
Please fill up the business registration no to match with the company
This action will remove the company from viewing assigned cases. An approval process will be needed if you want to allow the company to view assigned case in future.
Create new main registration organization unit
Notes: we have an expense record for this case, please consider the same for your invoice.
Ensure to check the checkbox for acceptance.
Yes, i understood the expense record dependency.
WIPreport import process has failed. File is invalid.
WIPreport import process has been completed successfully. All wipreports in file are imported.
WIPreport import process has been completed. There are some invalid data. Click to see invalid wipreport imports.
Once submitted, you will not be able to edit the claim.
The claim was submitted previously. No further edits will be allowed.
Branch import process has failed. File is invalid.
Branch import process has been completed successfully. All branch in file are imported.
Branch import process has been completed. There are some invalid data. Click to see invalid branch imports.
Create new w i p summary report
Case third party infos header info
Case third party vehicles header info
Create new case third party vehicle
The incident details have to be filled before proceeding with police reports.
Redirect to the incident details page?
Law Firm import process has failed. File is invalid.
Law Firm import process has been completed successfully. All Law Firms in file are imported.
Law Firm import process has begun.
Law Firm import process has failed.
Law Firm import process has been completed. There are some invalid data. Click to see invalid lawfirm imports.
Hospital import process has failed. File is invalid.
Hospital import process has been completed successfully. All hospitals in file are imported.
Hospital import process has been completed. There are some invalid data. Click to see invalid hospital imports.
Your form is invalid. Please check and correct it.
There is no tenant defined with name {0}
There is no user registered with name or email {0}
User {0} is not active and can not log in.
Role {0} will be deleted and unassigned from all assigned users.
This button immediately resets user specific permission settings and saves changes. The user will only have permissions from assigned roles.
It will be used when building links to this web site. It's needed for some tasks like building password reset links. Ex: http://mydomain.com/
A password reset link will be sent to your email to reset your password. If you don't get an email within a few minutes, please re-try.
Invalid user name or email address
This email is sent you to reset and re-create your password.
Please click the link below to reset your password:
This email is sent you to verify your email.
Please click the link below to verify your email address:
Please be sure you entered this page by clicking the link sent to your email. If this does not solve the problem, you can re-try to request a new password reset link.

Your email address is not confirmed. Please check your email and click the email confirmation link to activate your account. If you did not receive activation email, click the 'email confirmation' to request a new email.
Please be sure you entered this page by clicking the link sent to your email. If this does not solve the problem, you can re-try to request a new confirmation code.
Your email address is successfully confirmed.
Should change password on next login.
A link will be sent to your email to activate your email address. If you don't get an email within a few minutes, please re-try.
You can not register to the system!
Self user registration is disabled. Please contact the system administrator to register.
A confirmation mail sent to {0}. Please click link in the email in order to confirm your mail address.
Your account is waiting to be activated by system admin.
Allow users to register to the system.
If you disable this, users will only be added by admin using user management page.
New registered users are active by default.
If you disable this, new users will not be active (and can not login) until admin manually activates the account.
Assign to new users by default.
Static roles can not be deleted.
Tenant name can not be empty
Tenant name must be at least 2 chars, starts with a letter and continue with letter, number, dash or underscore and without any spaces.
You can select a jpg/jpeg/png file with a maximum {0}mb size.
Your profile picture could not be changed.
Picture size must be smaller than {0}mb. Please select another file.
You can only select jpg/jpeg file. Please select another file.
Please prove you are not a robot
You must prove that you are not a robot.
Unable to determine that you are not a robot.
Form is not valid. Please check and fix errors.
Can not change username of the admin.
We can not find the page you're looking for.
Welcome to asp.net zero startup project!

In this demo, you can use the left menu to test the application. This dashboard page is just for demonstration, but all other pages and functionalities are fully implemented, working and ready for production. You can add/apply your business requirements on this startup project (or remove any functionality you don't need). Thus, you can have a signification time gain to immediately start your own project requirements.

Welcome to the application. You can use the menu to start using the application. If you don't see any menu item, probably you don't have permission to see any page. Consider asking a system administrator for permissions.
A password reset link was sent to your email address. Please check your inbox.
Use security image question (captcha) on registration.
Please select one of the following tenants.
If you can not remember your password, {0}.
See demo for multi-page application version with asp.net mvc and jquery.
Notice: there is also a single-page application version built using asp.net mvc and angularjs.
Manage editions and features of the application
Are you sure to delete the edition {0}?
This button immediately resets tenant-specific feature settings and saves changes. The tenant will only have features from assigned edition.
One or more feature values are not valid!
Are you sure to delete the language {0}?
Can not edit or delete default languages. You can only edit or delete the languages you added. But you can change texts of all languages.
Use organization units to organize users and entities
Select an organization unit to see members.
Are you sure to delete organization unit {0}?
Are you sure to remove user {0} from organization unit {1}?
This user is already in the organization unit!
Please confirm to move {0} to under {1}.
Note: this operation is performed by another user on behalf of this user.
You can back to your account here.
Can not make cascade impersonation. This is already an impersonated login!
Can not impersonate a host user from a tenant user!
Can not impersonate a user of a different tenant!
Impersonation token is invalid or expired!
This is not an impersonated login!
You can not link to same account!
You must change your password before linking this account!
Link to user {0} will be deleted.
Impersonation token is invalid or expired!
Welcome to thinkninsurtech! Notification system is used to inform you for intended events. You can select which type of notifications you want to receive from the notification settings.
On a new user registered to the application.
A new user registered to the application. User name: {username}, email address: {emailaddress}.
This option can be used to completely enable/disable receiving notifications.
You completely disabled receiving notifications. You can enable it and select notification types you want to receive.
You can not delete own user account!
You can clear caches in application on this page.
A test email was sent successfully.
You can see latest logs in this page or download all logs in a single zip file.
Allow tenants to register to the system.
If you disable this, tenants will only be added by admin using tenant management page.
New registered tenants are active by default.
If you disable this, new tenants will not be active (and can not login) until admin manually activates the account.
On a new tenant registered to the application.
A new tenant registered to the application. Tenancy name: {tenancyname}.
Resized picture size must be smaller than {0}kb. Please resize down and try again.
Please do not enter an email address for username.
Notice: before changing the database connection string for a tenant, you should move the tenant database to the new location. Changing connection string does not move the tenant database.
Timezone setting changed. Click ok button to refresh page and changes to take effect.
Minimum password length cannot be shorter than {0}.
Minimum password reset code expiration hours cannot be shorter than {0}.
You can not be a friend with yourself.
You have a new chat message
User removed from your friend list.
The user will be removed from your friend list.
You don't have any friends. Write a username to above input box and click "add friend" button.
You don't have any blocked users. In order to block a friend, select a friend and select block from actions dropdown.

Write only username for same tenant users,
[tenancyname]\[username] for other tenant's users

for example:
.\admin -> for host admin
test\admin -> for test tenant's admin
admin -> for your tenant's admin
Add a friend from different tenant
Chat is not enabled for you.
Chat is not enabled for tenant.
Hi, this is a test message. Please login with my account in a different browser and check out how chat feature works.
Chat with other tenants is not enabled for you.
Chat with other tenants is not enabled for tenant.
Chat with host is not enabled for you.
Chat with host is not enabled for tenant.
Could not complete the login operation.
You are not authorized to perform this operation.
Target user could not be found. It's probably deleted.
The user account has been locked out. Please try again later.
You should verify yourself to login. Please select a verification type. A code will be sent based on selected verification type.
Security code could not be sent!
You should be logged in first, in order to verify yourself! Probably, your login has been timed out. Please go to the login page and re-try it.
Please enter the verification code sent to you.
Enable user account locking on failed login attempts
Maximum number of failed login attempt count before locking the account
Allow to remember browser. If you allow this, users can select to remember browser to skip second time two factor login for the same browser.
User is locked for a while after a certain amount of failed login attempts.
Could not validate external user login
Leave empty to switch to the host
Please wait while confirming your email address...
If you are changing your own permissions, you may need to refresh page (f5) to take effect of permission changes on your own screen!
Select a jpg/jpeg/png/gif file with a maximum of 100kb size and 512x128 pixel resolution.
Select a jpg/jpeg/png/gif file with a maximum of 50kb size and 128x128 pixel resolution.
Select a .css file with a maximum of 1mb size.
Size of the file exceeds allowed limits!
This tenant is allowed to have a maximum of {0} users.
Passwords must have at least one digit ('0'-'9').
Passwords must have at least one lowercase ('a'-'z').
Passwords must have at least one non-alphanumeric character.
Passwords must have at least one uppercase ('a'-'z').
Passwords must be at least {0} characters.
What will be done after subscription expiry

text.name: Your user profile information (first name, last name, etc.)

texts.text: Your user profile information (first name, last name, etc.)
All functionality you have in the application

text.name: Access to your applications and resources, even when you are offline

texts.text: Access to your applications and resources, even when you are offline
There is no logged in user.
Subscription termination is failed for following tenants {0} at {1}. You can find detailed error messages in system logs.
Your thinkninsurtech subscription is expired at {0}.
Expiring edition must be a free edition
This edition is used as an expiring edition for another edition(s). If you want to make this edition paid, you should first remove it from other edition's.
You are in trial period for {0} edition, {1} to purchase.
Your subscription will expire in {0} day(s).
Your trial period will expire in {0} day(s).
Can not upgrade subscription since tenant has no edition assigned.
Free editions cannot have trial versions
Your operation might be timed out, please contact us if you already made the payment.
Not sure what this screen means? You may need to check this
Scan this qr code with your mobile app
Google authenticator is not enabled for your account. You must first enable it in your settings.
Your thinkninsurtech subscription will expire at {0}.
This email is sent you to notify about your subscription expiration
Your thinkninsurtech subscription is expired at {1}. Your current edition assigned to {0}.
Subscription termination is failed for some tenants
This email is sent you to notify about your subscription expiration.
Admin role can not be removed from admin user
You can not remove user/role permission editing from the admin role
You can not remove user/role permission editing from the admin user
Your phone number is not verified
You can manage user's organization units from organization units page.
There is no organization unit for this user.
This page shows a few useful ui components those can be used in your application. Components in this page are implemented as full stack (includes the server side).
Check metronic theme for more ui components
Once submitted, the status will be updated to completed invoice.
You are currently not connected to internet
Your request timed out, please try again later.
An error occurred, please try again later.
There was an error communicating with the server.
You must change your password before logging on!
You do not have any permission. Contact your administrator.
The field {0} must be a minimum length of {1} and a maximum length of {2}.
The field {0} must be a minimum length of {1}.
The field {0} is not a valid phone number
The length of field {0} must be between {1} and {2}.
Two factor login is not currently supported!
Please enter no more than {0} characters.
In order to create an invoice, you must define the invoice information ('legal name', 'address' and 'tax/vatno') under settings->invoice.
Required permissions are not granted. All of these permissions must be granted: {0}
Required permissions are not granted. At least one of these permissions must be granted: {0}
Current user did not login to the application!
There is no image with given token
You are not linked to any account
We are preparing your data. You will be notified when your data is ready.
Your data is prepared, click here to download.
This notification doesn't belong to you.
This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience on our website.
There are tenants subscribed to this edition. Please assign a different edition to them and then delete this edition.
All tenants of {sourceeditionname} edition moved to {targeteditionname} edition.
We are moving tenants to selected edition. You will be notified when the operation is complete.
The price difference between your current edition and the one you are upgrading will be charged from your account.
If the button above doesn't work, paste this into your browser:
Select an organization unit to see roles
Are you sure to remove role {0} from organization unit {1}?
User import process has been completed successfully. All users in file are imported.
User import process has failed. File is invalid.
User import process has been completed. There are some invalid data. Click to see invalid user imports.
You are already logged in with user
All listed notifications will be deleted.
Your session is about to expire
Your session will expire because you have been inactive for a long time. Provide any mouse/keyboard input on the site to stop session termination. Redirecting in {0}sec.
Only one concurrent login per user
Disable concurrent login for a user. If a user logins with a second device, the first session is automatically closed.
Use security image question (captcha) on login.
There is no edition to upgrade
This role is inherited from one of users organizations
Are you sure to remove "{0}" page?
Are you sure to remove "{0}" widget from "{1}" page?
There is no view configuration for {0}
Are you sure to remove "{0}" page and back to default?
Show search bar in the menu
Stripe session information for the payment transaction could not be found.
Webhook event will be send with same parameters
Webhook send attempt processing queued. The process will be carried out as soon as possible.
Webhook subscription will be deactivated and your endpoint will no longer get webhooks
Webhook subscription will be activated and your endpoint will get related webhooks
Header key and value can not be null
You have to subscribe to test webhook to receive test event
Show lock screen when timed out
{0} can not be null or empty
Dynamic parameter and its relationships will be deleted completely. (this cannot be undo!)
Dynamic parameter value and its relationships will be deleted completely. (this cannot be undo!)
Trial accounts must have subscription end date
Delegation to user {0} will be deleted.
Are you sure to switch to user {0} ?
There is no active user delegation between your user and current user !
You can't delegate authorization to yourself !
Clean list to revert to default claims
Self tenant registration is disabled. Please contact the system administrator to register.
Allow users to use gravatar profile picture
Go back to your own account
Manage accounts linked to your account
See recent login attempts for your account
Change profile picture of your account
Download data belongs to your account
Smtp settings not provided, please provided smtp settings.
This external login option will be disabled for your tenant.
You haven't saved the settings, do you want to send the test mail with the previously saved settings?
Do you want to remove the file permanently?
There is no page defined for this dashboard. Please switch to edit mode and add a page!
If the email address is associated to a known user account then an activation link will be sent to you
You are not logged in as a host user!
There is no feature in your plan!
Webhooks allow external services to be notified when certain events happen. When the specified events happen, we’ll send a post request to each of the urls you provide.
Prevented user's new password from being the same as any of the last x passwords
The user's new password must different from how many last passwords?
New password must be different then last {0} password
Password reset code expiration hour count
You can not place selected widget more than once in a page.
We are writing to inform you that, you have created a tenant but didn't complete its payment. You can complete the payment by following the url {0} and finish the registration process.
Your thinkninsurtech subscription uncompleted payment notice
Notification will be send (this action cannot be undone).
You can use code, id_token, token or combination of those values.
Max sms length is 160 characters. Texts with more than 160 characters will be divided into 160 characters and sent via multiple sms.
There is no user in the selected organization units. You should at least select one user or organization unit contains user to send mass notification.
Please select a user or organization unit to send a mass notification!
New version notification will be send. (this action cannot be undone)
Would you like to update your app to the latest version?
A new version of the application has been released. Please update your app to stay up to date!
The message has been successfully sent to all users.
Hoverableaside must be enabled when allowasideminimizing is enabled !
Two-factor authenticators (2fa app for short) are a good way to add an extra layer of security to your account to make sure that only you have to ability to log in.
Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account. To log in, in addition you'll need to provide a 6 digit code
Your authenticator code or recovery code
Enter the code from your authenticator app
After you have scanned the qr code, the app will generate a six-digit code that you can enter below.
The next time you log in, you will be asked to enter a code from your authenticator app.
This email is sent you to approve changing email.
Please click the link below to approve changing your email:
Do you want to grant {0} access to your data
File size exceeded a maximum of {0}.
Result returned from chatgpy is empty.
Content returned from chatgpt is empty.
Successfully extracted the requested data from the image, please validate the extracted result.
Error reading document, please upload the correct document and try again.
Processing uploaded image to extract relevant information. This may take a while...
